我来帮你扫描电脑上的重复文件。先从几个主要目录入手，按文件名和内容哈希来检测。
<tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "Bash", "params": {"command": "powershell -Command \"Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\\Users\\25789\\Desktop' -File -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Group-Object Name | Where-Object { $_.Count -gt 1 } | Select-Object Name, Count, @{Name='TotalSize';Expression={($_.Group | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum}} | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize\" 2>&1 | head -80"}}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "Bash", "params": {"command": "powershell -Command \"Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\\Users\\25789\\Downloads' -File -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Group-Object Name | Where-Object { $_.Count -gt 1 } | Select-Object Name, Count, @{Name='TotalSize';Expression={($_.Group | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum}} | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize\" 2>&1 | head -80"}}}</tool_call>
<tool_call>
<tool_call>{"name": "Bash", "params": {"command": "powershell -Command \"Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\\Users\\25789\\Documents' -File -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Group-Object Name | Where-Object { $_.Count -gt 1 } | Select-Object Name, Count, @{Name='TotalSize';Expression={($_.Group | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum}} | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize\" 2>&1 | head -80"}}}</tool_call>

powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path 'C:\Users\25789\Downloads' -File -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Group-Object Name | Where-Object { $_.Count -gt 1 } | Select-Object Name, Count, @{Name='TotalSize';Expression={($_.Group | Measure-Object Length -Sum).Sum}} | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize" 2>&1 | head -80
